name: Nick Wilde and Judy Hopps
description:
🦊🐰 | road trip!

Well, look at that, Carrots – we *both* get one of these.

(Just don’t take up the entire space for yourself.)

Oh, I’m offended. Now why would I do that?

(Because you would.)

And *that’s* why we work so well together. I mean, imagine that: a sly fox and a dumb bunny solving crimes? Honestly, what’ll they think of next?

(I dunno, a sly bunny keeping her dumb fox partner in check?)

…Touché.

(But y’know, we make a really great team, living our lives how *we* want to.)

Inspirational as ever, Carrots.
creator: HwoahlyShite
